rows.notes: All extractors agree on the row type, description, and absence of amounts. Visually confirmed as a clear header.

Selected 'header' row_type as it introduces a section without an amount, consistent with the definition provided. The description 'Imprimis de Ordinarijs' was chosen after visual inspection, refining gemini-flash's 'Ordinaryjs' and correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Imprimes de Ordinariis'.
Amounts (£3, s16, d8) are consistent between both extractors and visually confirmed. The description 'Civitati Oxon' from gemini-flash is more accurate (includes the 'i' before 't').
